# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

  "Resources": {
    "QueuePolicy": {
      "Type": "AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy",
      "Properties": {
        "PolicyDocument": {
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid":"Example",
              "Effect":"Allow",
              "Action":["sqs:DeleteMessage","sqs:ReceiveMessage"],
              "Resource":"arn:aws:sqs:us-east-1:123456789012:MyQueue"
            }
          ]
        },
        "Queues": [ {Ref:"SQSQueue1"} ],
        "StatementId": ""
      }
    }
